changes: ✨ Create new premium origami app icon and splash screen
📱 Implement immersive full-screen PDF view (hides status & nav bars)
🥲 Implement Pdf scroll up down when user is zoom in the pdf
🔍 Add focal-point pinch-to-zoom (zooms exactly where you pinch)
🎨 Update fast-scrollbar design to perfectly match the app theme
⚡ Fix scrollbar lag and stuttering during fast page scrolling
👻 Add automatic 2-second fade-out for the fast scrollbar
🧹 Remove cluttered bottom-right zoom buttons for cleaner UI
title: Premium App Icon & Smooth Zoom Scrolling Engine
